titleStmt.title: SII 34.201: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 201. Perungaḷūr, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vamsōddhārakanātha temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Bhūpatirāya, Śarvadhāri, Puraṭṭādi 12 = A.D. 1408, September 10.

An asylum deed given to the ūravar of Peruṅgōḻiyūr by an araiya called Vāchchāṉ Chēmappiḷḷai of Muṉṉāttūr in Vaḍamalai-nāḍu in Vaḍa-panaṅgāḍu. The latter agreed in return to give some land in Muṉṉāttūr as well as his pāḍikāval income from a village for offerings in the Kulōttuṅga-chōḻīśvaram-uḍaiyār temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī mahāmaṇṭalīcuraṉ Arirāya vipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappu
varāyar kaṇṭaṉ pūpatirāyaṉukku cellāniṉṟa caṟuvatāri varuṣam puraṭṭā
ti mātam 10 2 tiyati nāḷ jayaciṅka kulakālavaḷanāṭṭu teṉpaṉaṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭu
pperuṅkōḷiyūr Ūravaṟku vaṭapaṉaṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭu vaṭamalaināṭṭu muṉ
ṉāttūr Araiyakaḷil vāccāṉ cēmappiḷḷaiyāṉnēṉ Āciṟiyap pira
māṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāḷ mutal cantirātitta varaikku Āci
ṟiyamāka pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta Uṭaiyār kulōttuṅka cōḷi
curamuṭaiya nāyaṉārku Ammutupaṭikku nāṉ kuṭutta nilamāvatu muṉṉāttūr
vayalil kūḷarvayakkalāṉa kulōttuṅkaṉ vayakkalum peruṅkōḷi
yūravaṟku Eṉpāṭikāval Iṭaikuṭi cutantaramuḷḷavu Eṟpayiṟpaṭ
ṭatum paṟṟikkoḷḷak kaṭavakaḷākavum vāccāṉ cēmapiḷḷaiyāṉ
Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
